ddt:Target.Name: Inverter_Emotor_SED_SW700
ddt:Target.Description:
Database for SED, based on reactivity table V1.11 Valid for SW521 and following SW ---------------------------------------------------------------
PDE : Pierre-Emmanuel ROGER Conceptor of DDT Base : Eric MOUNIER
DE-MEE3 Le 28/01/2015
Based on specifications: -------------------------------------- 36 - 00 - 011 - Unified Diagnostic Services (UDS) Implementation. 36 - 02 - 014 - Rules for the management of on-board reference numbers in UDS implementation.
________________________
Correction du 13/04/2015
Modification de la variable DTCDeviceIdentifier contenu dans chaque requete en service 19 (Little Endian --> Big Endian) La réponse aux requettes 222071, 222072, 222073 passent de 5 octets à 4 octets
Les services 1081, 10C0, 1085 passent respectivement à 1001, 1003, 1002.
Autoident en Vdiag4.
________________________
Correction du 08/09/15 - PE ROGER base mise à jour pour le SW520/521. Nouveaux DTC et DID ajoutés.
Nouveaux DTC : $080282, $08031C, $081264, $0817xx , $0818xx , $0819xx , $0820xx , $0821xx ,$0822xx ,$0823xx ,$0824xx $0825xx ,$0826xx ,$0827xx ,$0828xx ,$0829xx ,$0830xx.
DTC supprimés : $0816FC , $081419, $08028F
Evolution DTC : $081511 devient maintenant $081514
____________________________
Correction du 06/10/15 - PE ROGER
Ajout DTC $081025
_____________________________
Correction du 09/11/15 - PE ROGER
Ajout des informations pour AUTOIDENT
_____________________________
Correction du 06/01/16 - PE ROGER
Inversion des libellés des DTC $0817 et $0818 pour correction coquille.
______________________________
Correction du 29/01/16 - PE ROGER
Evolution des DID $3067,3068,3069,306A,306B,306C ==> passage de 1 à 2 octets pour être coherents avec besoin FNR. Suppression du DTC $082464, $081264, $0824F8, $081364, $080964. Inversion des 2 DTC $0817xx et $081718xx Correction des paramètres autoident ==> adaptation des longueurs des DID. Ajout de l'état 'Unavailable value' pour le DID $302F
______________________________
Correction du 16/02/16 - PE ROGER
Ajout du DID$3082 - Estimation température ELCO MàJ liste du DID$3059
______________________________ Correction du 12/04/16 - PE ROGER
Evolution des écrans.
DID $3082 as been defined as little endian. DID $2076,2074,2077,2075 are defined as big endian.

Data.Name: applicationDataIdentification
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer specific ECU application data identification record.

The format of the application data identification structure shall be ECU specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: systemSupplierIdentifier
Data.Comment: Name and address information of the supplier.
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier name and address information.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: ECUSerialNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the ECU (server) serial number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerKitAssemblyPartNumber
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM.
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer order number for a kit (assembled parts bought as a whole for production e.g. cockpit), when the spare part number designates only the server (e.g. for aftersales).

The record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the VIN number.

Record data content and format shall be specified by the vehicle manufacturer.

It shall not be erased when the ECU is reprogrammed.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used by reading services to reference the vehicle-manufacturer-specific ECU (server) hardware number.

Record data content and format shall be serverspecific and defined by vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUHardwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) hardware number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: diagnosticVersion
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the diagnostic version of the ECU.

It is defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Refer to manufacture ECU designer.

Data.Name: programmingOperationFingerPrint
Data.Description:
The value is written by the ECU when executing the SendKey SecurityAccess service

The value can be read in boot loader mode.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareVersionNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software version number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: Volt_APCEmotor_veh_status
Data.Comment: "APC wire status from USM to Emotor"

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: RoutineControlType
Data.Comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

Data.Name: MemoryAddress.16bits
Data.Comment: For ReadMemoryByAddress with 16 bits memory address

Data.Name: MemoryAddress.24bits
Data.Comment: For ReadMemoryByAddress with 24 bits memory address

Data.Name: MemoryAddress.32bits
Data.Comment: For ReadMemoryByAddress with 32 bits memory address

Data.Name: MemorySize.8bits
Data.Comment: For ReadMemoryByAddress with 8 bits length for memory size

Data.Name: MemorySize.16bits
Data.Comment: For ReadMemoryByAddress with 16 bits length for memory size

Data.Name: IOCTL.DataIdentifier
Data.Comment: Data Identifier received in reply to InputOutputControl request

Data.Name: RoutineIdentifierList
Data.Comment: Routine identifier - This is an example. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
Definition of RoutineControl

Data: RoutineIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all routine identifier that may be used with InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
  
    0x4501 - ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave

If some of these routine identifer have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the routine identifer followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the RoutineControl request, after the RoutineIdentifierList data.

Data.Name: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
Data.Comment: This is an example data for RoutineControl request. See RoutineIdentiifierList documentation.

Data.Name: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
Data.Comment: This is an example data for RoutineControl request. See RoutineIdentiifierList documentation.

Data.Name: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq
Data.Comment: This is an example data for RoutineControl request. See RoutineIdentiifierList documentation.

Data.Name: OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: List of Data Identifiers for Input Output Control - The list defined here is AN EXAMPLE.
Data.Description:
Definition of IOControl

Data: IOCTL.DataIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all IO devices that may be
  controlled by InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
 
    0 - DID_Pump
    1 - DID_Wiper

If some of these IO devices have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the IO devices followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: DID_Wiper.Mode
     Type: List
       0 - Slow speed
       1 - High speed

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the InputOutpuControl request, after the IOCTL.OptionRecord.Parameter data.

Data.Name: ElecTorqueRequest
Data.Comment: Torque demand for theEmotor from the ECM

Data.Name: RealisedTorque
Data.Comment: Calculated torque by Emotor for ECM

Data.Name: ElecMachineMaxMotorTorque
Data.Comment: Maximal available calculated torque in motor mode

Data.Name: ElecMachineMaxGenTorque
Data.Comment: Maximal available calculated torque in generator mode

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adj. failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or sys. operation obstructed or blocked
BMS2_R1 CAN msg / VOLTAGE not req

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DCHighVoltage
Data.Comment: Voltage value of the HV Network

Item.Text: Fault Type 1 INV Stopped C Class
Fault Type 2 INV Stopped D Class

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: ECM_SED_R1_protection_status
Data.Comment: Flag erreur CAN sur trame ECM_R1

Item.Text: no CRC or MCNT failures detected on ECM_SED_R1 message
CRC errors detected on ECM_SED_R1 message
MCNT errors detected on ECM_SED_R1 message

Data.Name: CAN_bus_message_unplausibility_status
Data.Comment: Flag erreur plausibilité sur message CAN

Item.Text: no CAN signal plausibility errors detected

Data.Name: SINCOS_sensor_offset_status
Data.Comment: Flag source erreur offset pour capteur SINCOS

Data.Name: SINCOS_sensor_SC_plus_status
Data.Comment: Flag source erreur shortcircuit plus pour capteur SINCOS

Data.Name: SINCOS_sensor_plausibility_status
Data.Comment: Flag source erreur plausibilité (sin²+cos²=1) capteur SINCOS

Item.Text: SINCOS square sum out of range

Data.Name: PhaseCurrentUMosfetDiag
Data.Comment: Courant de phase U mesuré au moment de la détection de la panne

Data.Name: PhaseCurrentVMosfetDiag
Data.Comment: Courant de phase V mesuré au moment de la détection de la panne

Data.Name: PhaseCurrentWMosfetDiag
Data.Comment: Courant de phase W mesuré au moment de la détection de la panne

Data.Name: PhaseVoltage1MosfetDiag
Data.Comment: Tension de phase 1 mesuré au moment de la détection de la panne

Data.Name: PhaseVoltage2MosfetDiag
Data.Comment: Tension de phase 2 mesuré au moment de la détection de la panne

Data.Name: KL40VoltageMosfetDiag
Data.Comment: Tension DC HV aux bornes de l'inverter mesuré au moment de la détection de la panne

Data.Name: DCLinkVoltageMosfetDiag
Data.Comment: Tension DC HV de la DC link mesuré au moment de la détection de la panne

Data.Name: InvtActCanMon
Data.Comment: Machine état interne Onduleur démandé sur CAN - Safety level 2

Data.Name: CurL1RawMon
Data.Comment: Valeur brute courant de phase L1 - Safety level 2

Data.Name: CurL2RawMon
Data.Comment: Valeur brute courant de phase L2 - Safety level 2

Data.Name: CurL3RawMon
Data.Comment: Valeur brute courant de phase L3 - Safety level 2

Data.Name: PwmAdcMuRawMon
Data.Comment: Valeur brute ADC µC - Safety Level 2

Data.Name: PwmAdcMon
Data.Comment: Valeur brute dyc PWM - Safety Level 2

Data.Name: OpmLevel2Mon_old
Data.Comment: Machine état interne Onduleur actuel - Safety level 2

Data.Name: CosRslvrMon
Data.Comment: Valeur COSINUS - capteur vitesse - Safety Level 2

Data.Name: TqSpMon
Data.Comment: Valeur couple demandée interne - Safety Level 2

Data.Name: TqSpCanMon
Data.Comment: Valeur couple demandée CAN - Safety Level 2

Data.Name: envd_0_mon_3
Data.Comment: Safety level 3 error environmental data byte 0

Data.Name: envd_1_mon_3
Data.Comment: Safety level 3 error environmental data byte 1

Data.Name: envd_2_mon_3
Data.Comment: Safety level 3 error environmental data byte 2

Data.Name: envd_3_mon_3
Data.Comment: Erreur interne - Safety Level 3 - Responsabilité CONTI

Data.Name: envd_0_mon_3_vd
Data.Comment: Erreur interne - Safety Level 3 - Responsabilité CONTI

Data.Name: envd_1_mon_3_vd
Data.Comment: Erreur interne - Safety Level 3 - Responsabilité CONTI

Data.Name: envd_2_mon_3_vd
Data.Comment: Erreur interne - Safety Level 3 - Responsabilité CONTI

Data.Name: envd_3_mon_3_vd
Data.Comment: Erreur interne - Safety Level 3 - Responsabilité CONTI

Data.Name: SINCOS_sensor_SC_gnd_status
Data.Comment: Flag source erreur shortcircuit GND pour capteur SINCOS

Data.Name: MosfetDiagStatus.MOS_U_HS_OPEN
Data.Comment: MOS phase U high side open détecté

Data.Name: MosfetDiagStatus.MOS_V_HS_OPEN
Data.Comment: MOS phase V high side open détecté

Data.Name: MosfetDiagStatus.MOS_W_HS_OPEN
Data.Comment: MOS phase W high side open détecté

Data.Name: MosfetDiagStatus.MOS_U_LS_OPEN
Data.Comment: MOS phase U low side open détecté

Data.Name: MosfetDiagStatus.MOS_V_LS_OPEN
Data.Comment: MOS phase V low side open détecté

Data.Name: MosfetDiagStatus.MOS_W_LS_OPEN
Data.Comment: MOS phase W low side open détecté

Data.Name: MosfetDiagStatus.MOS_U_HS_SHORT
Data.Comment: MOS phase U high side shorted détecté

Data.Name: MosfetDiagStatus.MOS_V_HS_SHORT
Data.Comment: MOS phase V high side shorted détecté

Data.Name: MosfetDiagStatus.MOS_W_HS_SHORT
Data.Comment: MOS phase W high side shorted détecté

Data.Name: MosfetDiagStatus.MOS_U_LS_SHORT
Data.Comment: MOS phase U low side shorted détecté

Data.Name: MosfetDiagStatus.MOS_V_LS_SHORT
Data.Comment: MOS phase V low side shorted détecté

Data.Name: MosfetDiagStatus.MOS_W_LS_SHORT
Data.Comment: MOS phase W low side shorted détecté

Data.Name: Safety_Level2_flag.u8ErrTqLevel1Mon
Data.Comment: Debounced error of the max or min possible torque of the level1 (u8ErrTqLevel1Mon)

Data.Name: Safety_Level2_flag.u8ErrSysAdcDebMon
Data.Comment: Systematic ADC error, PWM values do not match setpoint (u8ErrSysAdcDebMon)

Data.Name: Safety_Level2_flag.u8ErrHwAdcDebMon
Data.Comment: HW ADC error, ADC values do not match with each other (u8ErrHwAdcDebMon)

Data.Name: Safety_Level2_flag.u8ErrOrngTsMon
Data.Comment: Debounced error of temperature range check monitoring (u8ErrOrngTsMon)

Data.Name: Safety_Level2_flag.u8ErrTqSpClMon
Data.Comment: Debounced error of torque setpoint monitoring (u8ErrTqSpClMon)

Data.Name: Safety_Level2_flag.u8ErrInvActCanMon
Data.Comment: Error of non-valid values for inverter activation CAN signal (u8ErrInvActCanMon)

Data.Name: Safety_Level2_flag.u8ErrReqSftyModMon
Data.Comment: Flag indicating error request from Lvl2 (u8ErrReqSftyModMon)

Data.Name: Safety_Level2_flag.u8ErrOrngRslvMon
Data.Comment: Resolver error: Out of range - short circuit (u8ErrOrngRslvMon)

Data.Name: Safety_Level2_flag.u8ErrEmFaultTypeMon
Data.Comment: Error is detected when u8EmFaultTypeLevel1 is not FaultType 4 and u8ReqSftyModMon is invalid (deboun

Data.Name: Safety_Level2_flag.u8ErrCanMsgIdf124Mon
Data.Comment: Debounced error of the CAN message with ID 124 (u8ErrCanMsgIdf124Mon)

Data.Name: Safety_Level2_flag.u8ErrOverTempStatorMon
Data.Comment: Debounced error of the temperature limit check monitoring (u8ErrOverTempStatorMon)

Data.Name: Safety_Level2_flag.u8ErrNCompChkMon
Data.Comment: Debounced error of the rotor speed monitoring (u8ErrNCompChkMon)

Data.Name: Safety_Level2_flag.u8ErrNLevel1Mon
Data.Comment: Debounced error of the rotor speed of the level1 (u8ErrNLevel1Mon)

Data.Name: Safety_Level2_flag.u8ErrNStatorCompMon
Data.Comment: Debounced error of the stator speed comparison of the level1 with level2

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber_N
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer specific ECU application data identification record.

The format of the application data identification structure shall be ECU specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Programming
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / DDT : Unusable for Clip import

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000 nor for Clip import

Request.Name: ReadMemoryByAddress.32x8
Request.Comment: Read Memory By Address with address coded on 32 bits and data length coded on 8 bits

Request.Name: ReadMemoryByAddress.32x16
Request.Comment: Read Memory By Address with address coded on 32 bits and data length coded on 16 bits

Request.Name: ReadMemoryByAddress.24x8
Request.Comment: Read Memory By Address with address coded on 24 bits and data length coded on 8 bits

Request.Name: ReadMemoryByAddress.24x16
Request.Comment: Read Memory By Address with address coded on 24 bits and data length coded on 16 bits

Request.Name: ReadMemoryByAddress.16x8
Request.Comment: Read Memory By Address with address coded on 16 bits and data length coded on 8 bits

Request.Name: ReadMemoryByAddress.16x16
Request.Comment: Read Memory By Address with address coded on 16 bits and data length coded on 16 bits

Request.Name: ReportDTCInformation.ReportDTCFaultDetectionCounter_CPDD Import
Request.Comment: Report DTC fault detection counter counter for Clip import

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSupportedDTC_CPDD Import
Request.Comment: Report supported DTC for Clip import

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC_CPDD Import
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT

Test.Description: Circuit Short to Ground or Open
Circuit Short to Ground or Open
Circuit Short to Ground or Open
Circuit Short to Ground or Open
Circuit Short to Ground or Open
Circuit Short to Ground or Open
Circuit Short to Ground or Open
Circuit Short to Ground or Open
Circuit Short to Ground or Open
Circuit Short to Ground or Open
Circuit Short to Ground or Open
Circuit Short to Ground or Open
Circuit Short to Ground or Open

Device.Name: BMS2_R1 CAN msg / VOLTAGE not req
Device.Mnemonic: BMS2_R1 CAN msg / VOLTAGE not req
